content:
# Driver Licence Renewal Workflow

This workflow models an online driver licence renewal journey with identity checks, eligibility rules, medical declarations, payment, and manual review paths.

## Source Context (Demo)

| Resource | How it informs this mock | Caveat |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Transport customer service centres | Supports service-centre fallback and assisted renewal paths. | Location/service availability should be checked live. |
| Q-Ride providers | Demonstrates licensing-adjacent provider context for retrieval. | Training-provider data is not renewal eligibility. |
| BoatSafe training organisations | Shows how licence-style provider datasets could be retrieved. | Maritime training context only. |

## Process Flow

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A([Start renewal]) --> B{Identity verified?}
    B -- No --> C[Re-authenticate]
    B -- Yes --> D{Licence active?}
    D -- No --> E[Show service contact]
    D -- Yes --> F{Medical change?}
    F -- Yes --> G[Manual review]
    F -- No --> H[Calculate fee]
    G --> I{Review approved?}
    I -- No --> J[Send review outcome]
    I -- Yes --> H
    H --> K[Take payment]
    K --> L{Payment approved?}
    L -- No --> M[Retry payment]
    L -- Yes --> N([Issue renewed licence])
```

## Renewal Status Model

| Status | Meaning | UI state |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `draft` | User is completing the renewal form | Editable form with saved progress |
| `eligibility_check` | Server is validating renewal rules | Loading state with polite live region |
| `manual_review` | Medical or identity condition needs review | Read-only summary and expected timeframe |
| `payment_required` | Eligibility passed and fee is ready | Payment action enabled |
| `complete` | Renewal has been issued | Receipt and confirmation view |

## Form Validation Rules

| Field | Rule | Error behaviour |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Licence number | Required and valid format | Inline message linked with `aria-describedby` |
| Date of birth | Required and plausible | Error summary links to field |
| Medical declaration | Required yes/no answer | Radio group uses fieldset and legend |
| Contact email | Required for receipt | Validate before payment starts |

## Accessibility Notes

- Put focus on the page heading after route changes.
- Provide a single error summary before inline field errors.
- Preserve user-entered values after validation failures.
- Do not communicate eligibility using colour alone.

## Security Notes

- Minimise personal data rendered in the browser.
- Treat medical declarations as sensitive data.
- Keep review comments and audit events on the server.
